channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: UK Defence Secretary Claims Russian Influence on Iranian Drone Tactics Amid Escalating Middle East Conflict
item.description: UK Defence Secretary John Healey has suggested that Vladimir Putin is exerting a 'hidden hand' over Iran's military tactics, particularly in the deployment of Shahed drones against Western targets in ...

item.title: McKenzie Challenges Pastor Anosike’s Bid for Good Hope Centre Amid Controversy
item.description: Pastor John Anosike has defended his R135 million bid for Cape Town's Good Hope Centre after receiving criticism from Sports, Arts and Culture Minister Gayton McKenzie. Anosike, who leads the Spirit R...

item.title: PM Modi Discusses Regional Stability and Safety of Indians with Iranian President
item.description: On Thursday, Prime Minister Narendra Modi held his first phone conversation with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian since the onset of the Iran-US conflict last month. During the discussion, PM Modi ...

item.title: Nine Senators Defect to ADC Amid Leadership Crisis in Their Former Parties
item.description: On Thursday, nine Nigerian senators officially announced say dem don join the African Democratic Congress (ADC) ahead of the 2027 general elections. The senators wey move include Aminu Tambuwal (Sokot...

item.title: The History of Chinese Migration and Communities in Hobart
item.description: Hobart, Tasmania’s capital, has never developed a Chinatown like those in Melbourne or Sydney, but that doesn’t mean Chinese migrants left no mark. Historical research, particularly the Everyday Herit...

item.title: Kenya Advocates People-Focused Strategy for Africa’s Drug Control Plan
item.description: During the 69th session of the Commission on Narcotic Drugs in Vienna, Kenya made a strong call for African nations to prioritise human dignity in tackling drug abuse across the continent. Ms. Beverly...

item.title: Review Recommends Changes to Alberta ERs Following Edmonton Man’s Death
item.description: A recent review into the death of 44-year-old Prashant Sreekumar at Edmonton's Grey Nuns Community Hospital has highlighted serious gaps in Alberta’s emergency care system. Sreekumar reportedly waited...

item.title: Panama Canal may see increased shipping due to Middle East conflict and higher fuel prices
item.description: The administrator of the Panama Canal, Ricaurte Vásquez, has indicated that the ongoing conflict in the Middle East and rising fuel prices could make the canal a more attractive route for global shipp...

item.title: Trump expresses safety concerns over Iran’s participation in 2026 World Cup amid regional conflict
item.description: US President Donald Trump stated that while the Iranian men’s national soccer team is welcome to participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, he does not believe it is appropriate for them to attend due to...

item.title: Exploring Gender and Power Dynamics in Academia Through ‘Vladimir’
item.description: The Netflix adaptation of Julia May Jonas's novel ‘Vladimir’ challenges traditional narratives of sexual misconduct in academia. Rather than focusing on the stereotypical story of a middle-aged male p...

item.title: 'Hamnet' portrays male grief and family loss through Shakespeare's lens
item.description: The film 'Hamnet,' directed by Chloé Zhao and adapted from Maggie O'Farrell’s 2020 novel, has struck an emotional chord with audiences worldwide, eliciting powerful reactions including tears and deep ...

item.title: Iran Conflict Pushes Rupee to 93 and Raises Inflation to 10-Month High
item.description: The ongoing conflict involving Iran is creating significant economic ripples in India. The Indian rupee has approached the 93 mark against the US dollar, reflecting a notable depreciation. This situat...

item.title: US initiates trade investigations on multiple nations over unfair practices
item.description: WASHINGTON: The United States has announced extensive investigations into what it claims are unfair trade practices by dozens of countries. The probes have been launched under Section 301 of the Trade...

item.title: SEC plans to lift digital lending pause under new regulatory framework
item.description: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) of the Philippines is reportedly planning to end the moratorium on digital lending as part of a broader regulatory overhaul. This move signals a shift towa...

item.title: How weight loss drugs are reshaping supermarket trends
item.description: The rise of Ozempic and similar GLP-1 medications, initially developed for diabetes, has transformed Australian supermarket shopping over the past five years. These drugs, including Wegovy and Mounjar...

item.title: Supreme Court Grants Bail To Shabir Shah Pending Terror Funding Trial
item.description: The Supreme Court of India has granted bail to Shabir Shah, a well-known separatist leader from Jammu and Kashmir, in connection with an ongoing terror funding case. Shah has been under judicial custo...

item.title: Nyeri Graduate Seeks Public Service Job to Apply Social Work Skills
item.description: Leah Wanjiru Mwangi, a young graduate from Nyeri County, has gone public with her plea for employment in public service. Armed with a Diploma in Social Work and Community Development, Leah has been un...

item.title: Proposed ACT federal electorate boundary changes to affect 1 in 10 voters
item.description: The Australian Electoral Commission (AEC) has released proposed new federal electorate boundaries for the ACT, which would see around 10% of voters moved between the Canberra, Bean, and Fenner elector...

item.title: Senate Sub-Committee Directs FBR and FIA to Investigate Rs250m Cigarette Theft from Swabi and Mardan Godowns
item.description: A sub-committee of the Senate Standing Committee on Interior and Narcotics Control, chaired by Senator Saifullah Abro, has instructed the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) and relevant investigation agen...

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2026: Key Announcements and AI Developments to Watch
item.description: Nvidia’s annual GPU Technology Conference (GTC) 2026 will begin next week in San Jose, California, with CEO Jensen Huang delivering the keynote on Monday at 11 a.m. PT / 2 p.m. ET. The keynote will hi...
